query:
-- Update the History & Polity course syllabuses to include Articles of Religion as Module 3
UPDATE courses 
SET syllabus = CONCAT(
  syllabus,
  '\n\n### Module 3: Articles of Religion - Core Beliefs of the Free Methodist Church\n',
  '**Course Overview:** This module introduces Swahili-speaking leaders to the Articles of Religion found in the 2019 Book of Discipline. These are the core "building blocks" of what we believe as Free Methodists.\n\n',
  '**Learning Outcomes:**\n',
  '- Understand the core doctrines of the Free Methodist Church\n',
  '- Grasp the theological foundation of our faith\n',
  '- Connect our beliefs to our mission and practice\n\n',
  '**Topics Covered:**\n',
  '1. Who God Is (The Trinity) - One True God, The Trinity, Jesus Christ, The Holy Spirit\n',
  '2. The Authority of the Bible - Holy Scriptures, Our Guide\n',
  '3. Salvation and Grace - The Problem of Sin, God''s Grace, Good Works\n',
  '4. The Christian Journey (Holiness) - Entire Sanctification, Living Holy\n',
  '5. Our Identity and Mission - The Church, Justice and Compassion, The Sacraments\n\n',
  '**Required Materials:**\n',
  '- 2019 Book of Discipline (Articles of Religion section)\n',
  '- Course study guide\n',
  '- Summary for Swahili-speaking leaders\n\n',
  '**Assessment:**\n',
  '- Module reflection essays\n',
  '- Application of Articles to ministry context\n',
  '- Final project connecting beliefs to practice'
)
WHERE title = 'FMC History & Polity';
